suppress.notes: CVE-2026-0994 (GHSA-7gcm-g887-7qv7) is a denial-of-service in the *Python* protobuf library: google.protobuf.json_format.ParseDict() can be made to exceed max_recursion_depth via deeply nested Any messages, exhausting Python's recursion stack. It does not affect the Java runtime com.google.protobuf:protobuf-java — the Java JSON parser (JsonFormat) has no equivalent ParseDict path, OSV reports zero vulnerabilities for protobuf-java 4.34.1 in the Maven ecosystem, and every related advisory targets python3-protobuf (ALSA/SUSE). The match is a CPE collision on the shared "protobuf" product name. Scoped to the protobuf-java GAV + this CVE only.
